name: The Sleeper Agent
author: Mark Zeleznick
bootlegger: The Demon believes they are a good character and does not learn the Minions. On the first night, before any other abilities, each good player chooses a potential leech host. The Storyteller chooses the Demon’s kills. There is no visible Demon; a good player is secretly the Demon.

First night: Minions learn each other, gain a bluff, and receive a secret task. If all Minions complete their tasks, they learn the Demon, and the Demon wakes to choose kills. The Storyteller may also wake non-Demon players to choose kills (these do not occur) to mislead them.
